backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for IELTS tests and student responses with authentication for test management, automated scoring logic, and blob storage integration for media files.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three UI fixes for scrolling behavior, navigation button positioning, and footer overlap issues in the reading test layout.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and styles describing layout constraints, authentication flows, media handling, and test management functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag and root div for React application titled 'IELTS Test Management by Sayem'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing application state for view modes (welcome, test, results, responses) with flex layout ensuring header, main content, and footer are properly separated.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Dialog component for username/password authentication with form validation, error display, and loading states before allowing test creation.
Modal dialog for creating tests that validates credentials, uses useTestForm hook for state management, and submits test data with authentication to backend via useCreateTest mutation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a centered credit line 'Powered By Sayem Ahtesham' with styled borders and background.
Form component for creating/editing test questions with support for multiple question types, options management, and media upload (images/audio) with progress tracking. Adapts available question types based on test type (writing vs. other).
frontend/src/components/ReadingTestLayou: Two-panel layout component for reading tests displaying the passage on the left and current question on the right, both in scrollable areas.
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Detailed view of a student's test response showing student info, submission date, score, IELTS band, and correct/wrong counts with export and navigation options.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: Table view component for browsing all student responses with search functionality, displaying student name, batch, test, date, score, and band with delete and view actions.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Test results display showing score, IELTS band, accuracy, time taken, and correct/wrong counts with toggleable correct answers view and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Container component that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome message based on the current app state and view mode.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: Modal dialog requiring students to enter their full name and batch number before starting a test, with form validation and submit on Enter key.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface component that manages student registration, question navigation, answer tracking, timer display, fullscreen mode, and test submission. Supports both standard and reading test layouts with progress tracking and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Admin panel for managing tests with search/filter functionality, test creation (requires authentication), and viewing responses. Displays test list with type badges and handles authentication flow before allowing test creation.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with support for multiple question types (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short/long answer, matching, sentence completion) and displays associated media (audio/images) when present.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Session-based authentication hook with hardcoded credentials stored in sessionStorage, providing login/logout functions and credential retrieval for authorized operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook for managing fullscreen mode with enter/exit functions and state tracking via the Fullscreen API, handling browser fullscreen change events.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and providing authentication status states throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including CRUD operations for tests (with auth credentials) and student responses, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Custom hook that filters student responses by student name based on a search term.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Custom hook that manages test filtering state and logic, supporting search by title and filter by test type.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Custom hook managing test creation form state with validation, question management, and conversion to backend Test type format.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Custom hook handling test submission logic including answer grading, band score calculation, and mutation to create student responses.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Custom hook providing timer functionality with start, pause, reset controls and formatted time display.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and CSS custom properties defining color schemes for light and dark modes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette using OKLCH, container settings, border radius variables, shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking IELTS test app state with known UI scrolling/overlap issues and pending fix requests for passage/question layout.
